name: Curry Coconut Shrimp

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

method: Heat the prepared butter in a medium pan and sauté the onion, pepper, and
Stir in the cumin, ginger, turmeric, and curry powder and keep stirring for 2
Add the flour and stir for another 3 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and sugar.
Stir it very well and bring the liquid to a boil.
Reduce the heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the shrimp and shredded coconuts and simmer for 5 minutes.
